label: Market Order Flow
description: Scrollable order flow table with timestamps, latency, side, venue, and aggressor flag.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[markets-data]. 0.3 availableOn=[markets]. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no lib/mocks imports. 0.6 FIXED: added isLoading from useMarketsData() and passed to TableWidget. 0.7 emptyMessage set. 0.8 FIXED: added error+onRetry from useMarketsData() and passed to TableWidget. 0.9 no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 data from useMarketsData().orderFlowData via useLiveFeed() — no inline fetch. 1.2-1.5 N/A: orderFlowData is market-wide (instrument-level) data, not scoped by org/client/strategy — correct for a market order flow feed. 1.6 N/A (same reason). 1.7 no reference data in widget file.

findings: L0 fix: isLoading and error/onRetry were not wired — added from useMarketsData() and passed to TableWidget.
L1 1.2-1.6 marked N/A: orderFlowData is market-wide instrument data, not filtered by org/client/strategy — intentional design for a market feed widget.
Note: context disables liveBookUpdates in batch mode (isBatch => []) but orderFlowData itself has no batch guard — acceptable since static mock data has no tick interval.
